# SQGATE

> SQGATE is a professional digital electronics simulator, logic design toolkit, and educational platform that runs entirely in the browser.

## About
SQGATE offers a suite of web-based Electronic Design Automation (EDA) tools for students, hobbyists, and professional digital engineers. All tools execute entirely client-side using vanilla JavaScript, meaning no installation is required, zero latency is experienced, and all data remains private.

## Tools Available
- **Visual Circuit Simulator**: A drag-and-drop logic gate simulator with real-time signal propagation. Build complex circuits using fundamental gates, sequential components (flip-flops, registers), combinational blocks (ALUs, multiplexers), and I/O devices.
- **Interactive Karnaugh Map Solver**: A visual K-Map solver supporting 2 to 6 variables. It automatically groups prime implicants and essential prime implicants, outputting minimized Sum of Products (SOP) and Product of Sums (POS) Boolean expressions.
- **Finite State Machine (FSM) Designer**: A node-based state diagram editor supporting both Moore and Mealy machines. Includes real-time state traversal simulation and automated Verilog HDL code generation.
- **Truth Table Generator**: Evaluates complex Boolean algebra equations and generates formatted truth tables with intermediate computational steps.

## Educational Content
SQGATE hosts a comprehensive blog (`/blog/`) featuring tutorials on foundational computer architecture, from basic CMOS logic gates to 8-bit CPU design and advanced topics like pipelining and caching.

## Technical Architecture
- **Environment**: Client-side web application.
- **Core Technology**: HTML5 Canvas, Vanilla JavaScript, CSS3.
- **Offline Support**: Includes a Service Worker for full offline capabilities.
- **Export Formats**: Verilog HDL, high-resolution PNG images, truth table CSVs.

## Links
- Home: https://sqgate.online
- Circuit Simulator: https://sqgate.online/circuit-simulator/
- Karnaugh Map Solver: https://sqgate.online/k-map/
- FSM Designer: https://sqgate.online/fsm/
- Truth Table Generator: https://sqgate.online/truth-table-generator/
- Blog: https://sqgate.online/blog/
